_comment: Copy this file to config.local.json and fill in your values. config.local.json is gitignored.
_playnite_db_dir_help: Path to Playnite's library folder. Default null -> use %APPDATA%\Playnite\library.
_steam_root_help: Path to Steam install root (contains steamapps\). Default null -> auto-detect from registry, falling back to common install dirs.
